summary.headline: You appear in 34% of relevant AI queries — your top competitor appears in 61%.
summary.opportunity: There is a 27-point gap between you and the market leader. The biggest wins are in English-language AI searches and citation coverage.

visibility_scores.description: How often you were recommended across 50 test queries run across ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity.

signal_scores.note: You are referenced on fewer than 12 external sites. Top competitors average 40+.
Your name, title, and contact info are consistent across major platforms.
Your specialization in Chinese-speaking buyers is mentioned, but not consistently across all profiles.
Very few mentions in news articles, local business directories, or industry publications.
Good Chinese-language presence, but English-language web content is thin.

top_queries_tested.query: Top realtor for first-time buyers Ottawa
Who should I use to buy a condo in Ottawa
渥太华华人房产经纪人推荐
渥太华买房找哪个经纪人

recommendations.title: Build English-language citations
recommendations.detail: Get listed and mentioned in at least 10 English-language directories, local news sources, and real estate blogs. This is the single biggest driver of English AI visibility.

recommendations.title: Add a dedicated specialty page to your website
recommendations.detail: Create a page that clearly states your Chinese-speaking buyer expertise, Ottawa focus, and past client results. AI tools pull from website content to verify specialization.

recommendations.title: Request and publish client reviews in English
recommendations.detail: Reviews on Google Business and Realtor.ca that mention your specialty help AI tools confirm your expertise. Aim for 5+ new English-language reviews.

recommendations.title: Expand your Perplexity and Gemini presence
recommendations.detail: Your ChatGPT score is your strongest. Gemini and Perplexity rely more heavily on your web content and recent mentions — focus content efforts there.

recommendations.title: Publish bilingual market commentary
recommendations.detail: Short monthly posts in both English and Chinese about Ottawa market trends create fresh, keyword-rich content that AI tools index and cite.
